feed.title: SAP Community - SAP AI Launchpad
feed.subtitle: SAP AI Launchpad Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Forbidden AI Launchpad
entry.content: When trying to open AI Launchpad, the webpage just says "Forbidden". This happened after subscribing to the SAP Build Zone service, which also subscribed me to some Identity Verification service. I thought deleting all the services might resolve the problem, but did not seem to help. Can someone guide my in making sure that my user has the correct permissions?

entry.title: First AI Project AI Core: Execution does not write Log
entry.content:
Hi,

I am building my first AI Project (Create Your First Machine Learning Project using SAP AI Core) --> Quick Start for Your First AI Project Using SAP AI Core

I connected GitHub to SAP AI Core, checked the sync status of my app, created scenarios and workflows.

But when displaying the Logs after execution, the Log is empty.

Expected content of Log: "Yes......"

as coded print("Yes.....")

apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
kind: WorkflowTemplate
metadata:
  name: first-pipeline-natth
  annotations:
    scenarios.ai.sap.com/description: "Introduction to SAP AI Core"
    scenarios.ai.sap.com/name: "Tutorial"
    executables.ai.sap.com/description: "Greets the user"
    executables.ai.sap.com/name: "Hello Pipeline"
  labels:
    scenarios.ai.sap.com/id: "learning"
    ai.sap.com/version: "2.0"
spec:
  entrypoint: mypipeline
  templates:
  - name: mypipeline
    steps:
    - - name: greet
        template: greeter

  - name: greeter
    container:
      image: docker.io/python:latest
      command:
        - python3
        - '-c'
      args:
       - |
        print("Yes.....")<br>

Thanks for your support!

Till

entry.title: Generative AI Hub enabled in our SAP AI Launchpad App
entry.content: We would like to get Generative AI Hub enabled in our SAP AI Launchpad App subscription.

entry.title: not able to add - SAP AI launchpad
entry.content:
Hello,

I get an error message as - you do not have permission to add this plan, while trying to add Free service of AI launchpad.

what could be the reason behind this error message?

Br.

entry.title: Unavailability of AI Core and AI Launchpad in discovery center
entry.content:
Is there a reason that the SAP AI Core and SAP AI launchpad are not showing up in the discovery center?

These services show up as free tier in the SAP Discovery Center. But when I try to add this service in my sub account, it does not show up as a service plan for my account.

Can anyone help me with this? I am facing this error while trying to follow the following tutorial. Also another tutorial.
Thanks!

entry.title: SAP AI LAUNCHPAD: Dead process after 23 hours (expected was 3 minutes)
entry.content:
I followed the tutorial:
https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/ai-core-code.html#77ca6fba-fb46-4a1d-9506-f08faa01c597

And I get the execution dead after 23 hours running, (expected was 3 minutes)
I can see this on the status logs:


{
"details": [],
"workflow_info": [
{
"exit_code": "",
"id": "e0ff479e3f86f885",
"message": "",
"name": "e0ff479e3f86f885",
"outputs": "",
"phase": "Running",
"type": "Steps"
},
{
"exit_code": "",
"id": "e0ff479e3f86f885-3522031913",
"message": "",
"name": "e0ff479e3f86f885[0]",
"outputs": "",
"phase": "Running",
"type": "StepGroup"
},
{
"exit_code": "",
"id": "e0ff479e3f86f885-691995057",
"message": "pods \"e0ff479e3f86f885-mycodeblock1-691995057\" is forbidden: exceeded quota: free-tier-resource-quota, requested: pods=1, used: pods=1, limited: pods=1",
"name": "e0ff479e3f86f885[0].mypredictor",
"outputs": "",
"phase": "Pending",
"type": "Pod"
}
]
}

After the status is DEAD, I can see this status logs:


{
"details": [],
"workflow_info": [
{
"exit_code": "",
"id": "ecc3d9c13c9def36",
"message": "ef36[0].mypredictor error: Internal error occurred: failed calling webhook \"***\": failed to call webhook: Post ***/mutate-core-v1-pod-first?timeout=10s\": dial tcp ***:9443: connect: connection refused...",
"name": "ecc3d9c13c9def36",
"outputs": "",
"phase": "Failed",
"type": "Steps"
},
{
"exit_code": "",
"id": "ecc3d9c13c9def36-21680469",
"message": "Internal error occurred: failed calling webhook \"***\": failed to call webhook: Post ***/mutate-core-v1-pod-first?timeout=10s\": dial tcp ***:9443: connect: connection refused",
"name": "ecc3d9c13c9def36[0].mypredictor",
"outputs": "",
"phase": "Error",
"type": "Pod"
},
{
"exit_code": "",
"id": "ecc3d9c13c9def36-486764093",
"message": "ef36[0].mypredictor error: Internal error occurred: failed calling webhook \"***\": failed to call webhook: Post ***/mutate-core-v1-pod-first?timeout=10s\": dial tcp ***:9443: connect: connection refused...",
"name": "ecc3d9c13c9def36[0]",
"outputs": "",
"phase": "Error",
"type": "StepGroup"
}
]

Anybody knows where is my error?

Thank you

entry.title: Accessing a service deployed in sap ai launchpad via postman/CODE
entry.content:
hi,

we have created and deployed a service through ai launchpad, and have a service url.however i need to hit this api and get the response in my code. when i hit the url through postman i get 404 error.

can someone please guide me in this?

my query is: i want to access the api deployed via sap launchpad in my code and display results as part of app.

entry.title: Generative AI Core Streaming Chat Completion Response
entry.content:
Hi all,

me and my team are working with the mission related to the AI Core "Develop a CAP-based (multitenant) application using GenAI and RAG".

In this mission the service works with OpenAI API, and taking inspiration from it, we have implemented our own solution.

In our project we replicate the chat completion and all works fine but we have some problems when we try to convert the method in the below screen with the stream parameter set to true.

Setting this parameter in that way we can replicate the chatGPT behavior with the typing simulation of it's response.

Can anyone help us with this implementation?

Thank you for your time. It is very much appreciated.

Regards

entry.title: Not able to login to SAP AI Launchpad.
entry.content:
Hi Team,

   I have enabled the SAP AI Launchpad service using the booster, service created successfully and assigned the proper roles. But when I opened the application URL, it is not letting me in. Could you please help me on this. 

You can find the below screenshot, the page is hanging like below.

Thank you

entry.title: How should SAP embrace SAP AI?
entry.content:
I would like to express my sincere gratitude for considering my inquiry.

SAP has made significant investments in the field of artificial intelligence, and I have been fascinated by   AI  JOULE. I am impressed with the concept of end users being able to operate and configure the SAP system through natural language. Moreover, SAP Business AI appears to provide users with valuable implementation recommendations, based on the analysis of business data. This integration of AI into the SAP system enables users to interact with it in a more intuitive and efficient manner, thereby enhancing the overall user experience.

However, as I embark on my journey as a new SAP consultant,  I am curious to know to

1) What extent AI will challenge the role of SAP consultants in the future?  How far is the future?

2) Given this rapid technological shift, I am also wondering what steps a new SAP consultant should take to embrace this change and stay ahead of the curve. What knowledge or skills should we acquire to face the challenges posed by artificial intelligence?

3) In this era of SAP AI,  what is the most effective and efficient way to learn SAP?

Your guidance and expertise in this matter would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you once again for considering my questions, and I look forward to your responses.

entry.title: AI Core and AI Launchpad free tier - no default resource group
entry.content:
I recently subscribed to AI Core and AI Launchpad free tier, and I was trying to follow the tutorial: "Create your First Machine Learning Project Using SAP AI Core: https://developers.sap.com/group.ai-core-get-started-basics.html"

I get stuck right after linking my AI Core instance to the AI Launchpad, since after doing so I am not able to see any resource group and my workspaces folder is empty, I can't see neither AI Core Administration nor ML Operations. I believe I provided the proper entitlements to my subaccount, since the role collections that I assigned to it are:
ailaunchpad_aicore_admin_editor,
ailaunchpad_allow_all_resourcegroups,
ailaunchpad_connections_editor,
ailaunchpad_functions_explorer_editor_v2,
ailaunchpad_mloperations_editor.

entry.title: What is the use of SAP AI Core and SAP AI Launchpad
entry.content:
SAP is always providing innovation solutions to be competitor with industry standards, as part of this SAP Introduced SAP AI Core and AI launchpad services in BTP.

What is the significance of SAP AI Core and AI Launchpad. How can I use these services in integrating with SAP Commerce.

Thank you

entry.title: SAP GENAI Deployment URL is not able to connect in POSTMAN
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

SAP GENAI deployment URL is not able to respond the query back. I followed the same tutorial:Prompt LLMs in the generative AI hub in SAP AI Core & Launchpad | SAP Tutorials

any suggestion please?

Thanks,

Padmindra

#genai #LLM #SAPGENAI

entry.title: sap ai launchpad add application error
entry.content:
Hi,

when I try to add a application in sap ai launchpad, it shows the error: 

Failed to load target state: failed to generate manifest for source 1 of 1: rpc error: code = Unknown desc = Get "https://github.wdf.sap.corp/myRepository/tree/master/info/refs?service=git-upload-pack": dial tcp: lookup github.wdf.sap.corp on 100.64.0.10:53: no such host.

I tried to use id, emailname as user name and generate toke on git, however, same error shows.

any expert can help me?

entry.title: BI launch pad how to obtain cumulative payslip figures at any month
entry.content: I'm struggling to find where to find the correct fields to use in a report which at any given month I can see what is in the cumulative field for each pay element shown in the cumulative adjustment screen shown in iTrent.  Can anyone help?

entry.title: GenAI HUB SDK missing Model
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

We are currently implementing various applications based on the Gen_AI_HUB.
With the latest update of the models in the Generative AI Hub, the following models from Google
have been added:

These models can be created as a configuration and then implemented in SAP AI Launchapd .
After implementation, these are then also available in the Generative AI hub  and can be used as a prompt.

However, the implementation is still missing in the generative-ai-hub-sdk (current version 1.2.2)
I have refactored the library and unfortunately only the following models are currently implemented in the SDK.

 

Deployment.prediction_urls.register({
    'gpt-35-turbo': OPEN_AI_CHAT_COMPLETION,
    'gpt-35-turbo-16k': OPEN_AI_CHAT_COMPLETION,
    'gpt-4': OPEN_AI_CHAT_COMPLETION,
    'gpt-4-32k': OPEN_AI_CHAT_COMPLETION,
    'text-embedding-ada-002': OPEN_AI_EMBEDDING,
    'tiiuae--falcon-40b-instruct': OPENSOURCE_COMPLETION
})

 

Before I implement my own SDK I wanted to ask if the new models will be implemented in the generative-ai-hub-sdk (by SAP) and if so if there is already a release date for the new version.

Greetings
Dom

entry.title: SAP AI Launchpad: Dead process after 2 hours
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have created a basic execution, it ended up in Dead state with below status:

{
"details": [
{
"container_name": "main",
"exit_code": "",
"last_log_messages": "Error pulling container main logs",
"message": "Back-off pulling image ***/house-price:02\"",
"pod_name": "efdb960a3aff0aad-mycodeblock1-3924317824",
"ready": false
},
{
"container_name": "wait",
"exit_code": "",
"last_log_messages": "...-05-02T12:10:***\" level=info msg=\"Alloc=5477 TotalAlloc=13200 Sys=17383 NumGC=58 Goroutines=7\"time=\"2024-05-02T12:15:***\" level=info msg=\"Alloc=5457 TotalAlloc=13303 Sys=17383 NumGC=61 Goroutines=7\"",
"message": "",
"pod_name": "efdb960a3aff0aad-mycodeblock1-3924317824",
"ready": true
}
],
"workflow_info": [
{
"exit_code": "",
"id": "efdb960a3aff0aad",
"message": "child 'efdb960a3aff0aad-3924317824' failed",
"name": "efdb960a3aff0aad",
"outputs": "",
"phase": "Failed",
"type": "Steps"
},
{
"exit_code": "",
"id": "efdb960a3aff0aad-3924317824",
"message": "Step exceeded its deadline",
"name": "efdb960a3aff0aad[0].mypredictor",
"outputs": "",
"phase": "Failed",
"type": "Pod"
},
{
"exit_code": "",
"id": "efdb960a3aff0aad-885417400",
"message": "child 'efdb960a3aff0aad-3924317824' failed",
"name": "efdb960a3aff0aad[0]",
"outputs": "",
"phase": "Failed",
"type": "StepGroup"
}
]
}

Regards,

Niharika.

entry.title: SAP AI Launchpad - Deployment is in pending status for a day with No errors in logs
entry.content: Deployments in SAP AI Launchpad struck in Pending status, same docker image when deployed in local it works fine. Not seeing any errors in logs difficult to debug it.

entry.title: AI Core - Model Training and Inference for Multi output with multi Input types
entry.content:
Hi Community,

I’m working on a complex machine learning project using SAP AI Core, and I’ve hit a roadblock. The goal is to train and deploy a model that handles multiple input types (both numerical and categorical) and generates multiple outputs, which also include numerical and categorical values.

Problem Statement

 

  1. Model Training:
    • I have tried using models such as DecisionTreeRegressor, DecisionTreeClassifier, MultiOutputClassifier, and MultiOutputRegressor.
    • For encoding non-numerical fields, I’ve used LabelEncoder, OneHotEncoder, and MultiLabelBinarizer.
    • The training process sometimes fails, particularly when dealing with complex encoding schemes and multi-output formats.
    • Model Inference:
      • When training is successful, inference often fails. The primary issues are:
        • Difficulty in parsing multi-output results.
        • Challenges in converting outputs back to their original non-numerical forms.
        • Mapping values correctly to their respective output fields.

Detailed Steps and Issues

 

  1. Encoding:
    • For categorical inputs, I’ve tried both LabelEncoder for label encoding and OneHotEncoder for one-hot encoding.
    • For outputs, especially multi-label ones, I’ve used MultiLabelBinarizer.
    • However, combining these encoders with multi-output models seems to introduce complexity, particularly in maintaining the correct mappings during inference.
  2. Model Training:
    • Example code:

from sklearn.tree import DecisionTreeRegressor

from sklearn.tree import DecisionTreeClassifier

from sklearn.model_selection import KFold, train_test_split

from sklearn.inspection import permutation_importance

from sklearn.preprocessing import LabelEncoder

from sklearn.preprocessing import OneHotEncoder

from sklearn.preprocessing import MultiLabelBinarizer

from sklearn.multioutput import MultiOutputClassifier

from sklearn.multioutput import MultiOutputRegressor

from sklearn.compose import make_column_transformer

# Assume X_train and y_train are preprocessed input and output datasets model =

clf = MultiOutputClassifier(DecisionTreeClassifier(max_depth=DT_MAX_DEPTH, random_state=31))  

    clf.fit(train_x, Y_encoded)

  • Issues:
  • Encoding-decoding mismatches.
  • Models not handling mixed input-output types effectively.

 

  1. Inference:
    • Example code:

query = dict(call_request.json)

    input_features = [ # list of values from request call

        query['Company_code'],

        query['Vendor'],

        query['Amount'],

        query['InvoiceDocumenttype'],

        query['Fiscalyear'],

    ]

 

# Convert to DataFrame to match the input structure of the encoder  

    input_df = pd.DataFrame([input_features], columns=['Company_code', 'Vendor', 'Amount', 'InvoiceDocumenttype', 'Fiscalyear'])  

 

    # Preprocess input_features using one-hot encoder  

    input_features_encoded = encoder_X.transform(input_df)

 

    # Make prediction  

    prediction = model.predict(input_features_encoded)  

 

    # Postprocess prediction to original labels  

    prediction = encoder_Y.inverse_transform(prediction)

    # Map the prediction to the field names

    fields = ['HKONT','KOSTL', 'Profitcenters', 'Paymentterms', 'Partnerbanktype', 'Taxcode']

    prediction_dict = dict(zip(fields, prediction[0]))

  • Issues:
    • Decoding predictions back to original categorical values.
    • Ensuring the predictions map correctly to their respective fields.

Questions

  • Has anyone successfully implemented a multi-input multi-output model that handles both numerical and categorical data?
  • Are there specific strategies or best practices for encoding and decoding in such scenarios?
  • Can you recommend any resources or examples that deal with similar complexities?

Any insights, suggestions, or references would be immensely helpful!

Thank you in advance for your assistance.

entry.title: AI Launchpad: "Generative AI Hub" menu not displayed
entry.content:
Hi community,

I've been exploring the discovery center mission: Set Up SAP AI Core Generative AI Hub. We have subscriptions to SAP AI Core (extended plan) and SAP AI Launchpad (free plan).

I'm on the step "Configure AI Launchpad".

As per the task description, "Generatie AI Hub" menu should be visible.

However, in our environment, I don't see the "Generatie AI Hub" menu.

I've read the prerequisits in the document and assigned "ailaunchpad_genai_manager" to my user. After the assignment, I re-logged on to the service.

I would like to confirm if "Generatie AI Hub" menu is only available for standard plan, or I am missing any configurations.
